author: konstantinosgkilas
description: Renders inline SVG code fences as live graphics in Reading View and Live Preview mode. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Konstantinos Gkilas
manifest.description: Renders inline SVG code fences as live graphics in Reading View and Live Preview mode.
manifest.name: SVG Viewer

name: SVG Viewer

releases.author: konstantinosGkilas
releases.description:
Initial release of SVG Viewer.

- Renders inline `svg` code fences as live graphics
- Works in Reading View and Live Preview
- SVG sanitization (XSS prevention)
- Click-to-view-source toggle
- Copy SVG to clipboard
- Configurable settings (external resource blocking, badge)
